data.title: Integrate skogix/prompts/ template system
data.description:
**Context:** skogix/prompts/ contains reusable prompt templates organized by category.

**Current structure:**

* completed/ - finished prompts
* general-fillers/ - general-purpose templates
* memory-extraction/ - memory extraction prompts
* roles/ - role-based prompts
* skogai-structured-prompts/ - structured prompt system
* [skill-creation-example.md](<http://skill-creation-example.md>)

**Decision needed:**

* Where should prompt templates live in broader skogai structure?
* Are these personal templates or team-shared resources?
* Integration with existing prompt systems in parent?
* Should they be accessible to all agents or kept in skogix?

**Related:** Part of skogix folder integration (#skogix-integration)
